name: compile_autotune_warmup5
why: torch.compile mode=max-autotune may find faster kernels. Reduced warmup (5 steps vs 20) saves ~15 steps worth of training time. Together they should increase steps reached in 180s.
validates: ms/step improves by >5% or total steps increases meaningfully.
falsifies: max-autotune has higher compile overhead that eats the kernel gains; fewer warmup steps cause instability.
notes: Pure throughput play. Should compose with everything.
Kill: if ms/step is SLOWER (compile regression).
